heading: Medal of honor: duplicate medal
label: 8306 Medal of honor: duplicate medal
text: A person awarded a medal of honor shall, upon written application of that person, be issued, without charge, one duplicate medal of honor with ribbons and appurtenances. Such duplicate medal of honor shall be marked, in such manner as the Secretary of the Navy may determine, as a duplicate or for display purposes only.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 8306, , , related to promotion of officers in regular grade of colonel to grade of brigadier general, prior to repeal by , , , effective .
